author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Implementation done. Added SyncManager::repair_stale_signingkey() in sync/trust.rs (reads user.signingkey from cache_dir, skips literal key material, falls back to driver signing via existing fallback_to_driver_signing when the path is missing). Wired best-effort call into git_commit_in_cache so every commit self-heals. Extracted tilde-expansion into a module-private helper reused by both code paths. Five new unit tests: missing-path repaired, valid-path noop, literal-key skipped, cache-missing noop, no-worktree-override noop. 1702 lib tests pass. Ready for push + PR.
